Observation Data 1

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x2cc
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Category-muxed data word 1 for the selected channel. Semantics depend on OBS_CTRL.CAT_SEL.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] DATA r - -

Field Descriptions

DATA

Observation data 1
